world.title: China's Wuhan launches direct passenger route to Jakarta

business.description: Bajaj Housing Finance had listed on the exchanges in September 2024 with a 114% premium to its issue price of ₹70 apiece. It then went on to hit a post-listing high of ₹188.5 apiece. It is currently 54% below those levels. It is India's second most-bid IPO following LG Electronics India Ltd.

business.title: Why energy shock from Iran war has not spread to food
business.description: Ample carryover stocks from bumper harvests in 2025-26 have kept global food prices in check, unlike in 2008 and 2022 when they soared along with oil. However, this may not last long – and the failed US-Iran peace talks in Islamabad offer little hope.
